notes: Actionable: yes, in a coaching / 1:1 / hiring-bar context. The implication asks: 'notice your work across three Mondays. If quality oscillates with the team's guṇa — sharp in sattva, frantic in rajas, fogged in tamas — the buddhi described here is not yet established.' Reproducible: a manager calibrating senior IC capability can observe whether their report's PR quality, design-doc quality, and incident-handling remain stable as the team's guṇa shifts. Testable predicate (3.11): the diagnostic is artifact-stability-across-team-states, checkable against the engineer's actual portfolio. The verse correctly tags itself STRETCHED — the metaphysical injunction (transcend the three guṇas) is much larger than the operational diagnostic, and the verse does not overclaim. PASS for both 7.3 and 3.11.
